heuristic_descriptions.entity_association_risk: Query mentions entity/person names alongside numbers, raising risk of wrong variable-entity association.
heuristic_descriptions.lower_upper_risk: Query contains both lower-bound and upper-bound cues (e.g., 'at least' and 'at most'), risking lower/upper confusion.
heuristic_descriptions.multi_numeric_confusion: Query contains >=3 distinct numeric values, raising multi-float confusable grounding risk.
heuristic_descriptions.total_vs_per_unit_risk: Query uses both 'total/aggregate' and 'per/each/unit' language alongside numbers, risking total-vs-per-unit confusion.
heuristic_descriptions.percent_vs_absolute_risk: Query mixes percentage mentions and large absolute numeric values, risking percent vs absolute value confusion.
